name: Moonlight Limo
recent_news: No public news or website found; likely a 2-employee owner-operator limo service in Coventry Township/Akron area. Possible confusion with 'Moonlite Limo Service' of greater Akron (different phone), which markets stretch limos and party buses, not school bus contracting.
fit_notes: Too small (2 employees, ~$132K revenue) and not a confirmed school-bus operator; not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Star Limousine
recent_news: No website, news, or owner identified. Phone 330-628-5350 not associated with any school-bus contracting in public records. Akron-area school transport is handled by Akron Public Schools and Suburban School Transportation (sstn.com).
fit_notes: Tiny owner-operator limo; no evidence of yellow-bus or SPED contracting at scale. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Allied Limo & Sedan Svc
recent_news: No website or news traced to this Woodbridge VA PO Box entity. A separate 'Allied Limousine' brand in Philadelphia offers school shuttles but is unrelated. Northern VA school transport is dominated by Reston Limousine and district fleets.
fit_notes: PO-box, 2-employee sedan service; not a yellow-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Dynasty Limo Svc
recent_news: No website or news located for Dynasty Limo Service of Fairmont MN. Fairmont Area Schools handle their own bus routing via KSUM radio; no public contract with Dynasty.
fit_notes: Small rural owner-operator limo; insufficient scale and unconfirmed school-bus operation. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: United Limousine Svc
recent_news: No website or news traced. Name collides with 'United Limousine Service' of Dallas (separate luxury limo operator) and 'United Luxury Limousine' DFW. Midlothian ISD operates its own school bus fleet; no evidence Reg Fisher's entity holds a school-bus contract.
fit_notes: 2-employee owner-operator; not a confirmed school-bus operator. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
